text: [Pre-Signal Method #1/6] score_signal.py core scorer. Input: ticker + event_date + OHLCV history. Compute 5-factor clarity score: (1) buildup_duration 0-2.5 days with volume_ratio 1.5-2.5x, (2) buildup_consistency 0-2.0 from std-dev of ratios, (3) price-volume alignment 0-2.0 (rising price during buildup), (4) sector_isolation 0-1.5 vs peer avg, (5) post_outcome_t7 0-2.0 from |return|. Output: {total 0-10, factors dict, grade DIAMOND/GOLD/SILVER/BRONZE/NOISE}. Pure function, no IO. Unit tests with synthetic OHLCV fixtures. Spec: invest-kr skill pre-signal-capture-method v1.1.
review_note: Implemented scripts/signal_capture/score_signal.py with 5-factor scoring. 8/8 unit tests passing. Commit 73758457.

text: [Pre-Signal Method #2/6] detect_buildup.py volume phase classifier. Input: ticker + OHLCV 30-day window. Compute volume_ratio = today_vol / 20-day avg. Classify each day into 5 phases: quiet 0.8-1.2x / BUILDUP 1.5-2.5x / acceleration 2.5-4x / surge 4-10x / exhaustion 10x+. Returns timeseries of phase labels + buildup window boundaries. Output: {phases: [list], buildup_start_idx, buildup_end_idx, trigger_idx, summary}. Use pandas rolling mean. Ignore weekends/holidays.
review_note: Implemented scripts/signal_capture/detect_buildup.py. 9/9 unit tests passing. Commit 30a9921d on main.

text: [Pre-Signal Method #3/6] chart_generator.py matplotlib annotated. Input: ticker + OHLCV 6mo + buildup window + trigger date. Output: PNG 1200x800. Spec: 3 stacked subplots sharing x-axis — (top) candlestick OHLC + MA20 + MA60, (mid) volume bars color-coded by direction, (bottom) volume_ratio line with 1.5/2.5/4.0 reference lines. Annotations: yellow shaded rect over buildup window, red vertical line at trigger, arrow+label text at top. Use mplfinance or raw matplotlib. Output path: wavevault/news_retrospective/{grade}/{date}_{ticker}_{name}/chart_6m.png.
review_note: Implemented scripts/signal_capture/chart_generator.py. 5/5 unit tests passing. Real sample chart generated. Commit b2a92529.

text: [Pre-Signal Method #4/6] record_event.py trigger handler. Called when any of: (a) DART BUY/SELL/WATCH, (b) featured-stock news, (c) volume surge > 4x, (d) upper-limit hit, (e) 52w high breakout, (f) manual CLI invocation. Pipeline: detect_buildup → score_signal → chart_generator (DIAMOND/GOLD only) → save event.json to wavevault/news_retrospective/{grade}/{date}_{ticker}_{name}/. event.json schema: {event: {date, ticker, name, type, headline, source}, pre_signals: {volume_ratio_series, buildup_start_day, buildup_duration, price_action}, post_outcome: (initially null), score: {total, factors, grade}}.
review_note: Implemented scripts/signal_capture/record_event.py orchestrator. 6/6 unit tests passing. Commit ef8529b8.

text: [Pre-Signal Method #5/6] update_outcome.py daily cron (post-market). Scan wavevault/news_retrospective/ events in last 30 days. For each, check if today == event_date + 1/3/7 days. If yes, fetch that day's close price, compute chg% from event_date close, write into post_outcome.t+N field. Once t+7 outcome recorded, re-run score_signal to finalize factor #5 and reclassify grade (DIAMOND promotion or NOISE demotion). If grade changes, move folder between grade directories. Commit changes to git.
review_note: Implemented scripts/signal_capture/update_outcome.py. 6/6 unit tests passing. Commit a6b2acde.

text: [Pre-Signal Method #6/6] query_similar.py retrospective DB lookup. Input: current ticker + its recent volume_ratio series. Find top-K similar past events with score >= 7.5 (DIAMOND/GOLD only). Similarity metric: Euclidean distance on volume_ratio_series shape + buildup_duration match + price_action direction match. Output: list of [{event_path, similarity_score, post_outcome_t7, chart_path}]. Used by ai_market_advisor.py to enrich super_ant_picks with 'historical-analog-match' reasons. CLI: python query_similar.py <ticker> --top 5 --min-score 7.5.
review_note: FINAL: scripts/signal_capture/query_similar.py. 8/8 unit tests passing. Commit b104ac57. All 6 Pre-Signal Method features complete (42 total tests).

text: [COMPETE] UIA Shadow DOM + subtree re-resolve: cache UIA tree like UI Automata, liveness check per access, stale → parent subtree scan instead of full re-walk

text: [BUG] CDP prompt usability detection reports 'blocked' on idle GPT/Claude pages — ask gpt/claude returns empty. FindAllPrompts false-negative.
review_note: DecoratePromptInfo used cursor-rect as occlusion probe — prompt usability was false-negative whenever cursor wasn't inside prompt area. Fixed: probe WindowFromPoint at prompt-rect center.

text: [FEATURE] wkappbot chat: Claude CLI passthrough + rate-limit fallback to ask triad. MVP: exec 'claude' interactive, capture -p mode output, detect limit markers (usage limit/rate limit/5-hour limit/session exhausted/HTTP 429), auto-reroute same question to ask triad. Zero-config: works whether claude is installed or not. Reuses claude-usage UIA probe + Eye limit detection + .wkappbot/ask/*-fallback-*.md experience files.
review_note: ChatCommand.cs 추가 (170줄): wkappbot chat → claude CLI 패스스루. 인터랙티브는 stdio 상속 exec, print모드는 출력캡처+마커감지. claude 부재시 ask triad 자동 폴백, rate-limit 마커 8종 감지시 동일 폴백. --no-fallback 플래그 지원.

text: [FEATURE] scenario window_close popup dialog auto-response: when window_close triggers save/confirm dialog, scenario should have declarative dialog_policy (save|dont_save|cancel|ask_user) with auto-dismiss via UIA Invoke on dialog buttons. Currently CLOSE-GUARD only detects+logs but doesn't auto-respond — user must add extra Invoke step. Make it first-class scenario primitive.
review_note: Added dialog_policy YAML field (save/dont_save/cancel/ask_user) + focus-node grap dump on close failure. Commit da7697cd.

text:
Bug: wkappbot --sudo a11y still cannot access the admin realtime search window. Repro: start nfrunlite in the elevated session, run wkappbot.exe --sudo a11y windows, then wkappbot.exe --sudo a11y find " -encodedCommand cABpAGQAOgA8AG4AZgByAHUAbgBsAGkAdABlACAAcABpAGQAPgA= " --deep --depth 8 --all, then run python scripts/read_realtime_stock_codes.py --sudo --timeout 20 --find-depth 8. Observed: 11y windows returns Total: 0, 11y find returns No window found, and the sudo path logs dmin Eye unresponsive -- need spawn path followed by UAC cancelled err=-1073741502. Expected: sudo should attach to the admin Eye / elevated desktop and enumerate the open window, or emit a clearer diagnostic if the wrong session is being searched. In Get-Process, nfrunlite is in SessionId 1 but MainWindowHandle is 0.
-inputFormat
xml
-outputFormat
text --exit-event wkappbot-exit-29996
review_note: Fixed three distinct bugs: (a) infinite hang on STATUS_DLL_INIT_FAILED (d03182fc), (b) UAC re-prompt when admin Eye busy due to aggressive 100ms handshake in Launcher (0f21a75a, 1500ms bump on --sudo only), (c) silent respawn hiding handshake failures (1744412f, hard-fail with big banner + bug-auto suggest appended). Admin Eye alive reuse verified. Evidence script: test-sudo-handshake-miss-banner-and-hard-fail.sh

text:
[BUG-AUTO] CWD mismatch on `a11y read {proc:'nfrunlite',hwnd:0x80B04} --all`
Caller: D:\GitHub\WkAutoQuant
Eye: D:\GitHub\WKAppBot
MCP worker runs with Eye CWD -- relative paths in caller may resolve differently.
review_note: Removed false-positive CWD-mismatch bug-auto. MCP chain propagates caller CWD correctly (EyeMcpClient _meta.callerCwd -> McpCommand.Helpers -> CallerCwd.Value -> Runner sets Environment.CurrentDirectory). Kept [CMD-CWD-CORRECT] auto-promotion for Eye-in-subdir case. Commit c48a47a8.

text: [BUG] grap resolver picks wrong sibling popup when multiple #32770 dialogs from same process. Symptom: explicit hwnd in grap (e.g. {hwnd:0x01130642}) sometimes resolved to a different sibling hwnd. Reproducible when 4+ popups exist (Hero4/HeroGlobal often hit this). Fix: respect hwnd as authoritative when present in grap dict; do NOT fall back to closest-match heuristics.
review_note: Dup of T05:44:19.
